briefdescription.para: Verify .gpg-id file exists and is valid.

detaileddescription.para: ImitatePass::verifyGpgIdFile verify detached gpgid file signature.
ImitatePass::removeDir delete folder recursive.

briefdescription.para: Check if signing keys are valid.

detaileddescription.para: ImitatePass::Init initialize pass repository.

parameterdescription.para: path in which new password-store will be created
list of users who shall be able to decrypt passwords in path

detaileddescription.para: Writes the selected users' GPG key IDs to a .gpg-id file.

gpgIdFile
Path to .gpg-id file.
users
List of recipients.
Opens the specified file for writing, stores the key ID of each enabled user on a separate line, and warns if none of the selected users has a secret key available.

parameterdescription.para: &gpgIdFile - Path to the .gpg-id file to be written.
&users - List of users to evaluate and write to the file.

simplesect.para: void - This function does not return a value.
true on success, false on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString &gpgIdFile, const QString &gpgIdSigFile, bool addFile, bool addSigFile)
memberdef.name: gitAddGpgId

detaileddescription.para: ImitatePass::reencryptPath reencrypt all files under the chosen directory.

file
Password file path.
gpgIdFilesVerified
List of already verified .gpg-id files.
gpgId
Output parameter for recipient key IDs.
true on success, false on failure.
This is still quite experimental..
dir

briefdescription.para: Create git backup commit before re-encryption.

simplesect.para: true if backup created or not needed, false if backup failed.

briefdescription.para: Re-encrypt single file with new recipients.

simplesect.para: true on success, false on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (int id, int exitCode, const QString &out, const QString &err) override
memberdef.name: finished

detaileddescription.para: ImitatePass::finished this function is overloaded to ensure identical behaviour to RealPass ie. only PASS_* processes are visible inside Pass::finish, so that interface-wise it all looks the same.

memberdef.argsstring: (PROCESS id, const QString &app, const QStringList &args, QString input, bool readStdout=true, bool readStderr=true) override
memberdef.name: executeWrapper

detaileddescription.para: executeWrapper overrided so that every execution is a transaction
ImitatePass::gitCommit commit a file to git with an appropriate commit message.

memberdef.argsstring: (PROCESS id, const QStringList &args, QString input=QString(), bool readStdout=true, bool readStderr=true)
memberdef.name: executeGit

detaileddescription.para: ImitatePass::executeGit easy wrapper for running git commands.

memberdef.argsstring: (PROCESS id, const QStringList &args, QString input=QString(), bool readStdout=true, bool readStderr=true)
memberdef.name: executeGpg

detaileddescription.para: ImitatePass::executeGpg easy wrapper for running gpg commands.
ImitatePass::ImitatePass for situations when pass is not available we imitate the behavior of pass https://www.passwordstore.org/.
ImitatePass::GitInit git init wrapper.
ImitatePass::GitPull git pull wrapper.
ImitatePass::GitPull_b git pull wrapper.
ImitatePass::GitPush git push wrapper.
ImitatePass::Show shows content of file.
ImitatePass::OtpGenerate generates an otp code.

memberdef.argsstring: (QString file, QString newValue, bool overwrite=false) override
memberdef.name: Insert

detaileddescription.para: ImitatePass::Insert create new file with encrypted content.

parameterdescription.para: value to be stored in file

detaileddescription.para: ImitatePass::Remove custom implementation of "pass remove".
Re-encrypts all .gpg files under the given directory using the verified GPG key configuration for each folder.

dir
Directory path.
This method optionally pulls the latest changes before starting, creates a backup commit, verifies .gpg-id files per directory, and re-encrypts files whose current recipients do not match the expected keys. It emits progress, status, and error signals throughout the process, and optionally pushes the updated password-store when finished.

parameterdescription.para: - Root directory to scan recursively for .gpg files.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString src, const QString dest, const bool force=false) override
memberdef.name: Move

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString src, const QString dest, const bool force=false) override
memberdef.name: Copy

briefdescription.para: Search all password content by GPG-decrypting each .gpg file.

detaileddescription.para: Pattern is interpreted as a QRegularExpression (PCRE-like), which differs from RealPass::Grep which uses system pass grep (POSIX BRE via grep). The same pattern may produce different matches across the two backends.

pattern
Search pattern (QRegularExpression).
caseInsensitive
true for case-insensitive search.
Runs a background thread to avoid blocking the UI. Results are emitted on the main thread via QMetaObject::invokeMethod. A sequence counter discards results from superseded searches.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QStringList &env, const QString &gpgExe, const QString &filePath, const QRegularExpression &rx)
memberdef.name: grepMatchFile

briefdescription.para: Decrypt one .gpg file and return lines matching rx.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QStringList &env, const QString &gpgExe, const QString &storeDir, const QRegularExpression &rx)
memberdef.name: grepScanStore

briefdescription.para: Walk the store, decrypt every .gpg file, collect matches.
Implementation that imitates 'pass' when the real tool is unavailable.

detaileddescription.para:
ImitatePass provides a complete password store implementation using direct GPG operations when 'pass' is not installed or not enabled. It handles:
Direct GPG encryption/decryption
Git operations via direct subprocess calls
GPG key management and recipient lists
File-based password storage (.gpg files)
Re-encryption when recipients change
This is used as a fallback when RealPass cannot be initialized.
